Spotify's "free tier" isn't free, it's a bait-and-switch. You can't even play full tracks without getting funneled toward Premium at every turn. That's not a free service, that's a paywall dressed up as one, and it's exactly why people turn to modded versions. I'd give zero stars if I could. I remember when Spotify actually cared about its users, now it's just another company that let corporate greed replace basic decency. What a shame.
